sources.name: open-phrasebank
sources.note: Bundled as a static offline resource for desktop use.

sources.name: academic-phrases
sources.note: Organised by paper section for Ref-N-Write style browsing.

sections.title: Abstract
sections.description: Structuring concise summaries of research papers and theses.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.description: Setting the scene, stating aims, outlining structure, and defining key terms.

sections.title: Literature Review
sections.description: Reviewing previous work, comparing positions, identifying gaps, and being critical.

sections.title: Methodology
sections.description: Describing design, data, methods, instruments, procedures, and rationale.

sections.title: Results
sections.description: Reporting findings, data patterns, statistical results, and qualitative themes.

sections.title: Discussion
sections.description: Interpreting results, explaining findings, hedging, comparing with literature.

sections.title: Conclusion
sections.description: Summarising contributions, implications, limitations, and future work.
